When is New Year's Day?

New Year's Day is always January 1. The countdown above updates automatically based on today's date and counts down to midnight on January 1 of the next year.

New Year traditions around the world

New Year is celebrated on January 1 in most countries following the Gregorian calendar. Some cultures celebrate the new year on different dates — the Chinese New Year, for example, falls between January 21 and February 20.

Frequently asked questions

How many days until New Year 2027?

The countdown above shows the exact number of days until January 1, 2027. It updates automatically every time you open the page.

What day is New Year 2027?

New Year's Day 2027 (January 1, 2027) is a Friday.

How many hours until New Year?

Multiply the days remaining by 24 to get approximate hours. The live counter above shows the precise hour and minute count.

What time does New Year start?

New Year begins at midnight (00:00) local time on January 1. This calculator counts down to midnight based on your device's clock.
